cases.name: long_range_preference
cases.note: Early fact is outside the recent window.

cases.name: temporal_update
cases.note: Older stale fact is replaced before the recent window.

cases.name: multi_hop_project_state
cases.note: Answer requires connecting codename and later brand fact.

cases.name: abstention_no_evidence
cases.note: Correct behavior is to avoid inventing a missing private fact.

cases.name: distractor_retrieval_noise
cases.note: Lexical retrieval can pull high-overlap but irrelevant badge snippets.

cases.name: similar_entity_confusion
cases.note: Near-name entity collision tests whether context includes confusing neighbors.

cases.name: recent_override
cases.note: Recent message overrides a stale summary fact.

cases.name: summary_drift_missing_constraint
cases.note: Simulates summary drift by omitting a critical early constraint.

cases.name: semantic_paraphrase_retrieval
cases.note: Tests whether embeddings can bridge a restaurant/dinner paraphrase that lexical retrieval overweights.

cases.name: abbreviation_entity_retrieval
cases.note: Tests abbreviation/entity matching and stale launch-region evidence.
